description: User repeatedly asks Claude to commit, push, and sometimes reload services after changes -- a multi-step sequence that recurs across nearly every project.
After editing autodoro or similar systemd-managed services, user manually requests service reload each time instead of having a post-edit hook handle it.
User repeatedly builds Chrome extension zip artifacts and store screenshots by hand for each store submission cycle.
Multiple sessions across repos start with the user asking Claude to pull and build the project, a recurring bootstrap sequence with no per-project run command.
